prose.overview: Robinswood Golf Club is among Thailand's newest and most exclusive private golf facilities, having opened in 2023 within the Reignwood Park residential estate in Lam Luk Ka, Pathum Thani. Built to international championship standards, the course stretches to 7,597 yards from the tips — one of the longest layouts in the Bangkok region — and employs the Sub-Air turf management system used at Augusta National and Wentworth. Membership is essential to play, as Robinswood is a strictly private club with no public tee-time access. Members include high-net-worth residents of Reignwood Park, corporate clients, and serious golf enthusiasts who prize exclusivity and pristine course conditions. The club represents Bangkok's most elevated golf proposition outside of resort settings.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 18-hole par-72 design weaves through the manicured grounds of Reignwood Park, with the course architecture blending rolling fairways, generous rough, and strategically placed water features. At 7,597 yards it is a genuine big-hitter's test from the back tees, while forward tee options bring the course into range for mid-handicappers. Among the standout holes, the 7th is a demanding par-3 at 194 yards, while the 12th — nicknamed 'The Castle' — features a memorable 204-yard par-3 with an apple-shaped island green that demands precision iron play under pressure. The course closes on Mondays for maintenance, ensuring the playing surface is kept in pristine condition throughout the week. Groups are capped at five players on weekdays and four on weekends, ensuring a brisk pace and a peaceful, unhurried atmosphere. The Sub-Air drainage and aeration system keeps fairways and greens firm and fast in all weather conditions.
prose.tips: Robinswood is a private club — access requires membership or a personal invitation from a member. Prospective members are advised to contact the club's sales team for membership categories and pricing. Smart golf attire is mandatory. The club is closed on Mondays. Given the championship length, lower-handicap golfers will find the most enjoyment from the back tees; mid-handicappers should opt for the white or yellow tee options.
prose.location_and_access: Robinswood Golf Club is situated within the Reignwood Park development in Lam Luk Ka, Klong 11, Pathum Thani — northeast of Bangkok, approximately 52 km from the city centre. The drive from central Bangkok takes around 60 minutes via the Outer Ring Road and Route 31 (Wongwaen–Lamlukka Road). The area is not served by rail transit, so a private car or chauffeur is the standard means of access for members.
prose.rental_cta_context: Visiting a Robinswood member? LENGOLF can arrange premium rental club delivery to your Bangkok hotel so you arrive course-ready without the hassle of travelling with a bag.

en.title: Robinswood Golf Club — Course Guide, Membership & Golf Club Rentals
en.meta_description: Robinswood Golf Club in Lam Luk Ka — a world-class private course in Pathum Thani, Bangkok, opened in 2023. Golf club rentals delivered to Bangkok hotels.

verification_notes: Private members-only club confirmed by official website and multiple sources. Year 2023 confirmed. 7,597 yards from golfasian.com (golfbangkok.com shows 7,591 — minor rounding difference). No public green fees available; fees null. GPS is model estimate — no confirmed coordinates found in web research. Cart 1,500 THB from golfasian.com. Closed Mondays confirmed.
disputes: Yardage: golfasian.com 7,597 vs golfbangkok.com 7,591 — minor discrepancy. Using 7,597.
GPS coordinates are model estimate only — no confirmed coordinates found from web sources for Reignwood Park Lam Luk Ka.
